name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram inside the Metro Market at 4075 N Oakland Ave, Shorewood, WI 53211. Accessible during store hours. Call +1 414-967-9218.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established international money transfer company that has processed billions in transfers for millions of customers worldwide. The company operates a network of 2,000+ partner locations spanning more than 200 countries and territories, including major banks, national retailers, and local businesses. This extensive partnership model allows MoneyGram to provide both sending and receiving services through diverse channels.

MoneyGram offers multiple ways to transfer money: customers can send funds via their mobile app, through the website online platform, or in person at physical partner locations. Recipients have flexible options to receive money, including cash pickup at nearby locations, direct bank account transfers, debit card deposits, or digital wallet deposits. The company emphasizes competitive exchange rates and low transfer fees as key service features, with an estimated 3-step process from account creation to fund tracking.

The company distinguishes itself through its global partner network density and multi-channel flexibility. MoneyGram highlights advanced security features including encryption, fraud protection tools, and real-time transfer tracking. Customer testimonials on their site emphasize speed, ease of use, and competitive exchange rates, with high app store ratings (4.9 on App Store with 600K reviews, 4.6 on Google Play with 119K reviews). The brand leverages "millions served" and "billions sent" messaging to establish trust and scale.

MoneyGram functions primarily as a money transfer service rather than a traditional check-cashing operation, though it fits the check-cashing category due to its core function as a cash movement and financial services company. The service is most suitable for international remittances and cross-border payments rather than domestic check cashing. Users should note that actual fees, exchange rates, and availability vary by destination country and transfer method, which the website does not specify in detail.
pros: 2,000+ partner locations across 200+ countries and territories for global reach
Multiple sending methods: mobile app, online platform, and in-person at locations
Multiple receiving options: cash pickup, bank deposit, debit card, or digital wallet
High customer ratings: 4.9/5 on App Store (600K reviews) and 4.6/5 on Google Play (119K reviews)
Advanced security features including encryption and fraud protection tools
Real-time transfer tracking from initiation to completion
Competitive exchange rates highlighted as a service differentiator
cons: Website does not disclose specific fee amounts or exchange rate margins for different corridors
No information provided about transfer speed estimates for different destinations or methods
Limited transparency on which countries may have restrictions or higher costs
Requires account creation and profile setup before sending money
Website content does not clarify minimum or maximum transfer amounts
best_for: People sending international remittances to family members overseas
Individuals managing finances across multiple countries
Emergency fund senders needing fast international money movement
Users preferring multiple transfer and receive options for flexibility
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for people sending money internationally to family or contacts in 200+ countries who need flexible sending methods and multiple receive options. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparency on specific fees, exchange rates, transfer timeframes, and country-specific restrictions—customers must initiate a transfer or contact support to learn actual costs.
services: International money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Mobile app-based money sending and tracking
In-person cash sending at physical partner locations
Cash pickup at partner locations for recipients
Direct bank account transfer for recipients
Exchange rate services with competitive rates
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
